zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Braybrooke於大約1180年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可時，他的父親Robert de Braybrooke13歲，母親Henrietta21歲。他於大約1217年與Christiana Ledet在英國英格蘭貝德福爾笛卡爾 瓦登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1234年4月13日之前在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Braybrooke于大约1180年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可时，他的父亲Robert de Braybrooke13岁，母亲Henrietta21岁。他于大约1217年与Christiana Ledet在英国英格兰貝德福爾笛卡爾 瓦登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1234年4月13日之前在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾馬可特 哈波洛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Braybrooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Braybrooke was born about 1180, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Braybrooke, was 13 and his mother, Henrietta, was 21. He married Christiana Ledet about 1217, in Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 13 April 1234, in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Braybrooke est né environ 1180, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Braybrooke, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Henrietta, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Ledet environ 1217, à Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 13 avril 1234, à Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Braybrooke um 1180 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Braybrooke 13 und seine Mutter Henrietta 21. Er hat um 1217 in Old Warden, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom Christiana Ledet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 13. April 1234 in Market Harborough, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Braybrooke è nato il circa 1180 nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Braybrooke, aveva 13 anni e il suo madre, Henrietta, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Christiana Ledet circa 1217, nel Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 13 aprile 1234, nel Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Braybrookeが約1180年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで生まれた時，父Robert de Braybrookeは13歳，母Henriettaは21歳であった。約1217年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアオルド ワーデンでChristiana Ledetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1234年4月13日以前にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアマーケト ハーボロウで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Braybrooke(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Braybrooke(은)는 13세였고, 그의 어머니 Henrietta(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1217년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 드 워든에서 Christiana Ledet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1234년 4월 13일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 마크트 하르버루그h에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Braybrooke nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Braybrooke, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Henrietta, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Ledet aproximadamente 1217, em Old Warden, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 13 de abril de 1234, em Market Harborough, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Braybrooke родился около 1180 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Braybrooke было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Henrietta, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Ledet около 1217 г. в местности олд варден, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 13 апрель 1234 г. в местности маркет харбороую, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.
